summary: DemocratDollar v2.0 implementation complete — all 6 phases built and iOS build succeeds
phase: v2.0 - Fortune 500 expansion, nationwide candidates, push notifications
nextSteps: 1. Run updater pipelines (npm run update for companies ~5hrs, npm run update-candidates for nationwide ~10-14hrs). 2. Deploy Firestore indexes: firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes. 3. Create APNS key in Apple Developer portal and upload to Firebase Console. 4. Create signing certs in Xcode, archive, upload v2.0 to App Store Connect.
